news.headline: In the first BoC scenario, Canadian and global growth weaken temporarily. Canadian inflation falls to 1.5% for a year, then returns to 2% target.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Data is increasingly pointing to a considerable slowing in business investment and household spending.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Forecasts for economic growth and inflation are of little use as a guide to anything.
The second BoC scenario sees a sharp global slowdown and increase in inflation. Canada enters a significant recession, and inflation rises above 3% in mid-2026 before returning to 2%.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: We will proceed carefully and be less forward-looking than usual until the situation becomes clearer.

news.summary: Abbott Laboratories announced its first-quarter sales results, reaching $10.36 billion, marking a 7.2% increase from the previous year, closely aligning with the anticipated $10.40 billion. Reported sales rose by 4%, with organic growth at 6.9%, or 8.3% when excluding COVID-19 testing-related sales. The company, a major player in the U.S. MedTech sector, reported an adjusted EPS of $1.09, surpassing both the expected $1.07 and the management forecast of $1.05-$1.09. Robert Ford, Abbott's chairman and CEO, attributed the strong performance to the company's diversified business model. Medical Device sales notably surged by 9.9% to $4.89 billion, indicating organic growth of 12.6%, driven by segments such as Diabetes Care, Structural Heart, and Heart Failure. This resilience in performance during uncertain times showcases Abbott's ability to sustain growth consistently.Analysts have expressed cautious optimism regarding DexCom amidst looming competitive pressures in the market.
news.headline: Abbott Labs' Q1 sales hit $10.36 billion, up 7.2%, with adjusted EPS at $1.09, CEO credits diversification for success.

news.summary: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBKR) released its first-quarter results with earnings at $1.88 per share, falling short of the expected $1.92 per share. The quarterly revenue surpassed expectations at $1.43 billion, compared to a predicted $1.39 billion, showing growth from $1.2 billion in the same period last year. The company witnessed a 32% increase in customer accounts, reaching 3.62 million. Additionally, Interactive Brokers raised its quarterly dividend from 25 cents to 32 cents and announced a 4-for-1 forward stock split. More details are available elsewhere.
news.headline: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Q1 results show earnings at $1.88/share, revenue at $1.43 billion, 32% increase in customer accounts. Dividend raised from $0.25 to $0.32.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in New York, AlphaSense, a top AI-driven market intelligence and search platform, has detected signals suggesting significant disruption looming in the global semiconductor sector. The disruption is believed to be caused by proposed reciprocal tariffs.
news.headline: AlphaSense AI detects global semiconductor industry disruption due to proposed tariffs; market shifts underway.

news.summary: The first-ever World Internet Conference Asia-Pacific Summit 2025 took place in Hong Kong on April 14 and 15. Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd. ("Ping An" or the "Company", stock ticker: HKEX: 2318; SSE: 601318) was one of the co-hosts at the event.
news.headline: Ping An co-hosted Digital Finance Forum at World Internet Conference Asia-Pacific Summit on April 14-15 in Hong Kong, driving financial digitalization with AI. Stock tickers: HKEX: 2318; SSE: 601318.
BoC releases two scenarios on what could happen. First scenario envisages most tariffs being negotiated away, second scenario sees long-lasting global trade war.
BoC: Annualized Q1 GDP seen at 1.8% (vs 2.0% in January)
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Total CPI inflation expected to be about 1.5% in April. The elimination of consumer carbon tax will cut CPI inflation by 0.7 percentage points for a year.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: Q1 annualized growth is forecast to be about 1.8%, Q2 growth will be much weaker.
The Bank of Canada Monetary Policy report does not provide economic forecasts, cites uncertainty generated by US tariffs.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: If we find ourselves in a protracted trade war, we will see opposing forces on inflation.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: We are prepared to act decisively if information points clearly in one direction.
BOC estimates that Q1 2025 output gap was between -1% and 0%.

news.summary: DWF Labs, a crypto market maker, announced a $25 million investment in World Liberty Financial (WLFI), a DeFi project backed by US President Donald Trump and his sons. This investment includes purchasing WLFI tokens through a private transaction, enabling DWF Labs to participate in governance decisions. WLFI was launched on Sept. 16 , 2024, to promote DeFi and US dollar-pegged stablecoins with Trump emphasizing embracing crypto over traditional banks. DWF Labs will also provide liquidity for the project's stablecoin, World Liberty Financial USD (USD1). This investment aligns with DWF's expansion into the US, opening an office in New York City. WLFI has raised over $600 million since its launch, including $550 million from public token sales and investments from Justin Sun, Web3Port, and Oddiyana Ventures. This move signifies DWF's aim to strengthen institutional partnerships and engage with US regulators.
news.headline: DWF Labs invests $25M in Trump-linked World Liberty Financial, backing DeFi project and stablecoin liquidity in the US.

news.summary: In Parsippany, New Jersey, on April 16, 2025, American Financial Resources (AFR) made public their decision to appoint Robert Pieklo as the new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Michael Brenning as the Chief Operating Officer (COO). This significant move within the leading national mortgage lender is effective immediately.
news.headline: American Financial Resources (AFR) names Robert Pieklo as CEO and Michael Brenning as COO after record Q1 performance.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 16, 2025, Dynamsoft announced the launch of Dynamic Web TWAIN version 19.0, introducing major improvements to its web-based document scanning SDK. This latest version includes a series of RESTful APIs designed for platform and language-independent document scanning. These updates aim to enhance the overall functionality and accessibility of the SDK for users.
news.headline: Dynamsoft releases Dynamic Web TWAIN v19.0 with new features incl. RESTful APIs for document scanning.

news.summary: Mines in China were confiscated and factories were established, prompting Japan to make significant investments in Australia. Meanwhile, despite growing concerns about supply chain control, the United States took minimal action in response to these developments.
news.headline: China dominates rare earth industry with mines and factories, Japan invests in Australia. US lags despite supply control worries.
BoC: Higher inflation in the last couple of months reflects some rebound in goods price inflation and the end to the temporary suspension of sales tax.
BoC: Starting in April, inflation will be pulled down for one year by the removal of the consumer carbon tax, lower oil prices will also dampen inflation.
BoC: We will continue to assess the timing and strength of both downward pressure on inflation from a weaker economy and upward pressures from higher costs.
BoC: We will proceed carefully, with particular attention to risks and uncertainties facing the domestic economy.
BoC: We expect tariffs and supply chain disruptions to push up some prices.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: The Bank of Canada held rates as it gained more information about the path forward for US tariffs and their impact.

news.summary: Coop Pank is extending an invitation to shareholders, investors, analysts, and stakeholders to participate in its upcoming investor webinar set for April 23, 2025, at 9:00 am (EET). This webinar will be conducted in Estonian.
news.headline: Coop Pank AS to present Q1 2025 results in investor webinar on 23 April 2025 at 9 am (EET) in Estonian.
BoC Rate Decision Actual 2.75% (Forecast 2.75%, Previous 2.75%)
BoC: Major shifts in US trade policy have increased uncertainty, cut prospects for growth, and raised inflation expectations.
BoC: We will support economic growth while ensuring inflation remains well-controlled.

news.summary: A total of over 4.2 tons of peanut butter was gathered in Westerly, Rhode Island. The 25th Annual Peanut Butter Drive organized by Washington Trust managed to collect 4,710 jars of peanut butter alongside raising over $6,100 in monetary contributions. This initiative aims to provide assistance to...
news.headline: Washington Trust's 25th Annual Peanut Butter Drive collects 4,710 jars and $6,100, marking a 68% increase in donations.

news.summary: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ: CSX) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 16 after market close. Analysts predict earnings of 37 cents per share, a decrease from 46 cents per share in the previous year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $3.45 billion, down from $3.68 billion last year. CSX recently raised its quarterly dividend from 12 cents to 13 cents per share. On Tuesday, CSX shares closed at $27.90, falling by 1.3%. For more details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.
news.headline: Wall Street forecasts CSX Q1 earnings: Analysts predict 37 cents/share (down from 46 cents), revenue at $3.45B (compared to $3.68B). CSX shares fall 1.3%.

news.summary: A new tool has been introduced in Sydney that is the first of its kind in the world. This supply chain tariff calculator is designed to assist business owners and investors in comprehending the real financial consequences of global tariffs.
news.headline: First supply chain tariff calculator estimates tariffs to exceed $4.7 trillion, helps understand economic impact.

news.summary: On May 3, Bocado will bring back its renowned burgers for a single day to back Children's Healthcare of Atlanta. By savoring a smash burger and fries, patrons can aid in funding autism care at Marcus Autism Center. A staple in Atlanta's culinary landscape, Bocado is generously supporting this cause.
news.headline: Bocado is bringing back their iconic burger for one day on May 3 to support Children's Healthcare of Atlanta by helping fund autism care at Marcus Autism Center. #fundraising #burgerrestoration

news.summary: Discover in a complimentary online seminar how Protein A membrane chromatography boosts monoclonal antibody (mAb) purification, providing increased throughput and shorter processing durations. Participants will receive valuable information on the application of this technology within a CRDMO environment for biologics advancement.
news.headline: Learn how Protein A membrane chromatography improves mAb purification in a webinar by Xtalks. Gain insight into CRDMO setting for biologics development.

news.summary: BLUE BELL, Pa., April 16, 2025 - Self Storage Manager, Inc. unveiled their cloud-based solutions for the self-storage industry, positioning themselves as a leading Total Solutions Provider in the sector. Known for their Self Storage Manager (SSM) property management software, the company is making strides to revolutionize operations. The comprehensive offerings cater to the specific needs of the industry, promising streamlined processes and efficiency. This move comes as demand for such solutions continues to rise, with an estimated 25% increase in self-storage facilities over the last year alone.
news.headline: Self Storage Manager, Inc. integrates Power BI reports via Microsoft Fabric for cloud-based solutions in self-storage industry.

news.summary: Discover in this complimentary online seminar how to establish a data infrastructure that can grow with your biopharmaceutical process development needs. Participants will acquire knowledge on creating intuitive digital processes that drive increased usage, productivity, and readiness for artificial intelligence integration. Distinguished speakers will provide valuable information on this topic.
news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks on digitalization and AI in biopharmaceutical process development, focusing on scalable data foundation and user-friendly workflows.

news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established to provide small and mid-sized employers access to Carrum's esteemed network of healthcare providers. The partnership, announced on April 16, 2025, between AssuredPartners ("AP"), a leading global insurance brokerage, and Carrum, will offer top-notch services in surgery, cancer care, and substance use treatment to business owners. This initiative aims to cater specifically to small and mid-sized employers, offering them comprehensive healthcare solutions. Based in Orlando, Fla., and San Francisco, the collaboration signals a significant step in expanding access to quality healthcare services for employers, with a focus on enhancing healthcare options for businesses of varying sizes.
news.headline: AssuredPartners partners with Carrum Health to offer surgery, cancer care, and substance use treatment via top providers.

news.summary: Shaw Sports Turf has announced plans to repurpose 93 tons of material from the fields utilized during the College Football Playoff (CFP) events in 2024 and 2025. This initiative highlights the company's dedication to sustainability. The efforts signify a step towards reducing waste and promoting environmental responsibility. The recycling of materials from these fields showcases Shaw Sports Turf's commitment to utilizing eco-friendly practices. The company, headquartered in CALHOUN, Ga., disclosed this information on April 16, 2025, emphasizing its continued focus on environmental consciousness and promoting a greener approach in the sports industry.
news.headline: Shaw Sports Turf to recycle 93 tons of material from College Football Playoff fields proving sustainability efforts.

news.summary: Panopto greatly strengthens its position in the field of scalable, personalized video learning for higher education and other sectors with its recent acquisition of Elai. This move, recognized for its strategic importance, marks a significant milestone for Panopto and showcases its commitment to innovation. The company, known for its AI-powered knowledge creation and management capabilities, is making waves in the industry. The acquisition signals a new era for Panopto, setting a high standard in the realm of video-based education. The development, which took place in Pittsburgh, was announced on April 16, 2025, through a press release. This announcement underscores Panopto's dedication to revolutionizing learning experiences through the integration of cutting-edge technology and expertise. This achievement highlights the company's forward-thinking approach and its drive to enhance educational resources on a large scale.
news.headline: Panopto wins "Best in Education" award for M&A deal under $20M by acquiring Elai, raising standards in video learning.

news.summary: A tech company that started in Malta has rapidly grown into a major player in the home services industry worldwide. Rozie is quickly expanding its operations in Europe and the United States. The on-demand cleaning app developed by Rozie simplifies the process of booking a home cleaner by allowing users to simply scan a QR code or place an order. The company's growth is reflected in its ambitious plans for expansion, as it establishes itself as a disruptor in the global market. The news was announced on April 16, 2025, in Valletta, Malta.
news.headline: Rozie, an on-demand cleaning app, expanding globally with plans in Europe and U.S. Started in Malta, scaling fast.

news.summary: In Walnut Creek, California, on April 16, 2025, Vantiq and Obayashi Corporation unveiled a joint venture to enhance visitor experiences at the Panasonic Group Pavilion. Through their combined technology, real-time interactions and features will be integrated to elevate the overall experience for visitors. This collaboration aims to provide dynamic and engaging experiences, leveraging the latest advancements in technology to create a memorable visit. Stay tuned for the unveiling of these innovative enhancements at the Pavilion.
news.headline: Vantiq partners with Obayashi for Osaka-Kansai Expo. Real-time experiences at Panasonic Pavilion. April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Be a part of the worldwide pulmonary hypertension (PH) community in recognizing and honoring individuals living with PH this May. On April 16, 2025, in Washington, the Pulmonary Hypertension Association announced its participation in a global movement alongside over 80 organizations on May 5. This initiative aims to raise awareness and celebrate the strength of those affected by PH.
news.headline: Global PH community unites for World PH Day 2025 on May 5, with 80+ organizations, raising awareness for those living with PH.

news.summary: A popular personal chef service operating in 15 states is using a new strategy to connect with professional athletes. Tiny Spoon Chef, founded by entrepreneur Janice Carte from Boston, is expanding its reach within the athlete community. This move comes as the service gains traction and recognition. The service offers tailored chef experiences for clients and has a growing presence in the culinary industry. With a strong foundation in Boston, the company is now focusing on reaching out to athletes to provide their unique culinary offerings.
news.headline: Tiny Spoon Chef expands nationwide, now in 15 states, and offers premium service for health goals, targeting professional athletes.

news.summary: A top-tier communications agency specializing in cutting-edge technology brands, OmniScale Media, has revealed its decision to prolong its partnership with the SC Conference Series, headquartered in Vancouver, Wash. This new agreement, set to last for two years, comes on the heels of the unprecedented success achieved by the conference series. The companies have decided to build on their record-breaking achievements and continue their collaboration into the foreseeable future.
news.headline: OmniScale Media extends partnership with SC Conference to 2026, enhancing tech brand success.

news.summary: In its latest update for March, NetZoom® disclosed additions to the NetZoom Visio Stencils Device library, featuring a diverse range of Audio/Video and network/data center infrastructure devices. This update includes devices from notable companies such as APC, Aruba Networks, Crestron Electronics, Dell Computer, EdgeCore Networks, IBM, and VeloCloud. The update encompasses a significant number of new devices for users to access and utilize, enhancing the library's offerings for professionals and users in various industries.
news.headline: NetZoom updated its Visio Stencils Library with devices from brands like APC, Aruba, Dell, IBM, including Audio/Video & network equipment.

news.summary: Harbor, a leading expert services provider for the legal industry, has named Michael Stahl as the new Chief Integration Officer and General Manager. This move highlights the company's emphasis on business integration as it expands its global presence. The appointment was made public on April 16, 2025 in Chicago. Stahl's role will be pivotal in driving the company's integration strategies forward, signaling Harbor's commitment to enhancing its operations on a global scale.
news.headline: Harbor names Michael Stahl as Chief Integration Officer & General Counsel, emphasizing global expansion.
